instructions.instruction: Use this skill when the task is to move existing code out of a Rails app and into an engine.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when the task is to move existing code out of a Rails app and into an engine.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger extract-engine.

instructions.instruction: Prefer incremental extraction over big-bang rewrites. Preserve behavior first, then improve design.
instructions.original_snippets: Prefer incremental extraction over big-bang rewrites. Preserve behavior first, then improve design.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger extract-engine.

instructions.instruction: **DO NOT extract and change behavior in the same step.** Extraction must preserve existing behavior; refactoring and improvements belong in a separate step after the move is complete and verified.
instructions.original_snippets: **DO NOT extract and change behavior in the same step.** Extraction must preserve existing behavior; refactoring and improvements belong in a separate step after the move is complete and verified.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger extract-engine.

instructions.instruction: Each slice must have: one coherent responsibility, minimal new public API, passing regression tests, and a clear next step.
instructions.original_snippets: Each slice must have: one coherent responsibility, minimal new public API, passing regression tests, and a clear next step.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger extract-engine.

instructions.instruction: Verify regression coverage still passes before proceeding to the next slice:
instructions.original_snippets: Verify regression coverage still passes before proceeding to the next slice:
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger extract-engine.
